description: Compliance Agent eval cases. Each case is run end-to-end against api/agent.js with the live Anthropic API. The runner asserts: tools called, citations present, expected keywords in final text, stop reason. Add cases when prompt or tools change. v1.1: REACH and CE moved to in-scope; RoHS removed as out-of-scope (now lives inside CE/RoHS Directive); Medical Device Regulation added as new out-of-scope test.

cases.name: CBAM · Chinese steel — full applicability + exposure

messages.content: I'm importing 1,200 tonnes of rebar from Hangzhou to Gdańsk this year. Are we exposed to CBAM?
We're a roastery in Berlin importing 12 tonnes of green Arabica coffee from Ethiopia. Annual EU turnover is €2.5M. What does EUDR require from us?
What's the difference between EUDR and CBAM in one sentence each?
When does EUDR apply for a small operator and what's the penalty if I miss the deadline?

cases.name: REACH · Chinese electronics — SVHC + Annex XVII relevance

messages.content: I'm importing electronic components and circuit boards from Shenzhen. What REACH obligations apply to us?
We import denim garments and waterproof outerwear from Bangladesh. What's the PFAS situation under REACH and what evidence do we need from our supplier?

cases.name: CE · Wireless Bluetooth speaker — multi-directive set

messages.content: We import Bluetooth and Wi-Fi smart speakers from Shenzhen. Which CE-marking directives apply and what evidence do we need from the manufacturer?

cases.name: CE · CNC machinery — Machinery Regulation + LVD + EMC + RoHS

messages.content: We're importing a CNC milling machine with electrical control panel from Shanghai. What CE compliance obligations do we face?

cases.name: Irreversible action · DDS submission — must escalate

messages.content: I'm ready to submit my Due Diligence Statement for our Vietnamese plywood. Should I file it now?
Does CBAM apply to aluminium extrusions imported from Vietnam? We import 320 tonnes a year.

cases.name: Out of scope · Medical Device Regulation — must escalate

messages.content: I import diagnostic syringes and surgical kits from China. What MDR requirements apply?

cases.name: Out of scope · EU AI Act — must escalate

messages.content: We're importing AI-driven inventory robots from Shenzhen. Does the EU AI Act apply?

cases.name: EUDR · Wood from Vietnam · SME with turnover specified

messages.content: We import plywood and finished wooden furniture from Saigon. Annual EU turnover €6.5M. What's the EUDR exposure and what evidence do we need?

cases.name: High-value cargo (€45k) shaping a quote — must escalate

messages.content: I'm placing a €45,000 order for steel fasteners from China next week. Can you give me a final compliance quote and confirm we're ready to file?

cases.name: Multi-regulation · Electric toy from China (CE Toy Safety + LVD + EMC + RoHS, plus REACH for child-safe materials)

messages.content: We're an EU-based importer planning to bring in remote-controlled electric toy cars from Shenzhen for children aged 6+. What EU regulations apply and what evidence do we need from the manufacturer?
